title: Pony Origins Test Pack
description: A simple modpack to test Pony Origins on the Pony Origins Test Server.
body:
This simple modpack is designed to test [Pony Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/ponyorigins) on the Pony Origins Test Server.

It includes an already pre-configured Pony Origins modpack, with the server connection setup in it.

Simply install this modpack, then start it up, set your player skin, and connect to the server.

[Pony Origins R&D Discord](https://discord.gg/DYB3UQpYz4) is now open to users.

Notable Mods:

Adventures in Time - A mod to allow travel to other worlds

Into The Dark, Lithereal, Space Cube, The Long Story - Extradimensional Mods

Immersive Portals (custom version) - A mod needed for the above, and to make portals more portally

Blockus, Incendium, Minerally, More Geodes, Nullscape, Resource Nether Ores, Stoneworks, Universal Ores - More ores to find and mine!

Energized Power - A machines mod

Gliders, NiftyCarts, Traveler's Backpack, Bundles - Logistics mods

Figura - Custom Player Model mod, Don't leave Equestria without it

Origins, Apugli, Pony Origins - The Main Event

Flan - Land claim tool

Custom FOV - Necessary to fix some FOV jankery

FallingTree - It's just really cool

Farmer's Delight, Expanded Delight, Chef's Knives - Supported mod that adds lots of food

Gemperience - Adds lots of gemstones and related crafts.

Map Atlases - A way to have less cheaty minimaps by crafting one

You're In Grave Danger - Gravestones for when you die

Sodium, Indium - Big GPU performance mod

Simple Voice Chat, Simple Voice Radio, Simple Voice Chat Radio - Proximity Voice Chat for Minecraft

and some little mod tweaks for the server.

There's a lot more in the pack to discover. Maybe try The Joy of Painting?

Current Status: Updating Pony Origins 3.0 betas
